text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as we continue Nishino Flower's
specialized short-distance training in preparation
for the Sprinters Stakes...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Haaah!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, has Flower gotten even faster? She's
aiming for the Sprinters Stakes, right?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
With speed like that, she could hold her own
against students in their senior year, no problem.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Phew... How did I do, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I did? But I felt like I lost a bit of speed at the end
there...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I'm still lacking in stamina. It might be a
good idea for me to strengthen my body some
more, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can tell that Nishino Flower is lacking in
confidence. It seems like she hasn't put her
performance in the Japanese Oaks behind her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The good news is that she's becoming faster by
the day. But how do I get her to realize that?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Aha! I think it was around here!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Well, well! Who was it that called for me?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Bakushin O? You said someone called you here?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hm? I could have sworn I heard someone say
"with speed like that, she could hold her own
against students in their senior year."

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And everyone knows speed is synonymous with
Bakushin! Raise your hand if you're the one who
called me! No need to be shy now!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
So, this is the final stop along the wind's
currents... Please allow me to join you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: You're here too, Zephyr? Umm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O and Yamanin Zephyr have
both declared that they'll be running in the
Sprinters Stakes. In other words, they're Nishino
Flower's rivals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
These two have already achieved great results in
sprints and mile races. If Nishino Flower can run
well against them, it's sure to boost her
confidence.
choice_data_list: I have a favor to ask you two...

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O and Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Hyaaah!
Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(They really are just as fast as I imagined! It's like
they're on a whole different level... But!)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I want to catch up to them! Raaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: No way... Did I... actually win?

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: She blew past like a searing gale...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow! Now that was some impressive speed!
Nice Bakushin, Flower!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: D-do you think so? Thank you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to express my own thanks as well. The
Sprinters Stakes has become even more enticing
now.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Whaaa?! Wait, you two are also entering that
race?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No! But I do now! And I won't lose on the big day,
that's for sure!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I won't lose either!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower nods with strong determination. It
looks like she's built up a bit of confidence in
herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's evening and we've wrapped up our training
session. Next, I should...
choice_data_list: Find a way to build power for incline running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Sprinters Stakes will be held at Nakayama
Racecourse. Nishino Flower will need strength to
overcome the steep slope right before the finish
line.
choice_data_list: (I could really use some advice, though...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: La, la, laaa! ♪ Bath time, bath time...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Correct. My father instructed me in the
application of this training method.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? That's Bourbon with... Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to consult with Mihono Bourbon since I
was sure she'd have some valuable input on power
training.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Those are the key points of ramp training. In
Flower's case, I recommend keeping the physical
load at fifty percent.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Please do your best for Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (Trainer's still hard at work for my sake.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Then I also need to...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What matters at the end of a race is willpower.
Encouragement from the crowd can provide a
spark, so I decide to learn the best cheering
methods.
choice_data_list: (I could really use some advice, though...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: La, la, laaa! ♪ Bath time, bath time...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Once she hears something like that, she'll be
bursting with energy!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? That's Biko with... Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to consult with Biko Pegasus. As
someone who's always going around helping
others, I wanted to hear her thoughts.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
In the heat of a race, nothing beats hearing
honest cheers that come from the heart!
choice_data_list: Thanks. You've been a big help!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
A true hero is always ready and willing to lend a
hand! Call on me whenever you're in a bind!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (Trainer's still hard at work for my sake.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Then I also need to...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After gathering advice from other Umamusume, I
take a break and go for a walk outside.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: There you are, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Do you have a moment? Right now?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, here you go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, Nishino Flower hands me a steaming
rice ball and a flask containing miso soup.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
A late-night snack. The staff gave me permission
to use the kitchen.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I thought you might be hungry.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...Um, I hope you don't think I'm being a
busybody.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! I know it's hot out tonight, but warm food
is still easier on the tummy.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...I'm going to give it all I have tomorrow, too. I'll
definitely win my next race.
